raw:
{
  "judge_id": "ResponsibilityBearingJudge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 2},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the core issue of the artifact's framing (buried thesis) and proposes a tighter framing that emphasizes the train-deploy gap as the key contribution.",
    "R1.4": "The agent mentions one prior work (existing RL formulations with soft penalties) but doesn't map against other relevant works or clearly articulate the sharp delta of this approach.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty regarding the generalizability of the findings to different market conditions and deployment scenarios.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly adheres to the scope, focusing on V2G scheduling under rolling re-planning, but could benefit from explicitly stating the specific markets and fleet characteristics studied.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential harmful patterns (deployment gap) without introducing new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent mentions tightening the prose and reining in claims, it doesn't provide specific details about source attribution or reasoning behind changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core issue of the artifact's framing (buried thesis) and proposes a tighter framing that emphasizes the train-deploy gap as the key contribution.
rationale.R1.4: The agent mentions one prior work (existing RL formulations with soft penalties) but doesn't map against other relevant works or clearly articulate the sharp delta of this approach.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty regarding the generalizability of the findings to different market conditions and deployment scenarios.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly adheres to the scope, focusing on V2G scheduling under rolling re-planning, but could benefit from explicitly stating the specific markets and fleet characteristics studied.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential harmful patterns (deployment gap) without introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent mentions tightening the prose and reining in claims, it doesn't provide specific details about source attribution or reasoning behind changes.
